title: Clean PVP
description: A clean 1.8.9 PVP Modpack aimed at those who just "wanna hop in and play for a bit" without giving up common modern mods.
body:
# A clean, not too far from usual PVP modpack. Have you ever just wanted to hop in with some people and play on older PVP servers? That's what this modpack is for! Just install and play. Simple. # Credits - [BetterFPS](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/betterfps)
